results.rendered_html:
kakudmat a. [astyarthe matup]
1 Furnished with a hump;  Pt. 1. 
2 Running high (as a wave).
— m.
1 A mountain (having peaks).
2 A buffalo; madodagrāḥ kakudmaṃtaḥ  R. 4. 22 ; a humped bull; 13. 47 ;  Ku. 1. 56. 
3 N. of a medicinal plant (ṛṣabha).
— tī The hip and the loins.
